hotspots.title: Manuel Adorni’s illicit enrichment scandal
hotspots.blurb: Argentina's Chief of Staff Manuel Adorni faces intense scrutiny over allegations of illicit enrichment, including $245,000 in cash payments for luxury home renovations and undeclared assets. Multiple lawmakers have requested his detention, and new witness testimonies are complicating his legal situation.
hotspots.affect: This scandal commands disproportionate attention due to its moral outrage framing, cross-source repetition, and the perceived hypocrisy of a high-ranking official in a government campaigning against corruption.

hotspots.title: Trump’s Iran war escalation and diplomacy
hotspots.blurb: President Trump announced 'Project Freedom' to guide ships through the Strait of Hormuz amid rising tensions with Iran, which has issued a 30-day ultimatum. The U.S. has deployed military assets, and Trump has threatened severe retaliation if U.S. vessels are attacked.
hotspots.affect: This story dominates coverage due to its high-stakes geopolitical framing, alarmist language, and the potential for catastrophic consequences, amplifying affective investment across right-wing media.

hotspots.title: Javier Milei’s governance and scandals
hotspots.blurb: Argentine President Javier Milei faces declining approval ratings amid economic struggles, corruption allegations involving his Chief of Staff, and controversies over press freedom. His government has also been accused of funding disinformation campaigns abroad.
hotspots.affect: Milei’s governance commands intense affective investment due to his polarizing leadership style, economic shock policies, and the moral outrage over alleged corruption and press restrictions.

hotspots.title: Vox’s ‘national priority’ and regional pacts
hotspots.blurb: Vox is pushing its 'national priority' agenda in regional governments, advocating for policies that prioritize Spaniards over immigrants in public services. This has led to clashes with coalition partners like PP and sparked moral outrage from left-wing parties.
hotspots.affect: Vox’s agenda commands high affective investment due to its moral charge, polarized contention with other parties, and the alarmist framing around immigration and national identity.

hotspots.title: Meloni’s diplomatic tensions with Trump
hotspots.blurb: Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni has faced criticism from Trump over Italy’s stance on Iran and NATO commitments. Trump has threatened to withdraw U.S. troops from Italy, leading to diplomatic friction and a visit from U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio to smooth relations.
hotspots.affect: This story commands high affective investment due to its geopolitical stakes, alarmist framing around U.S.-Italy relations, and the moral charge of Trump’s threats undermining NATO alliances.
